abstract: Add reference documentation to your symbols that explains how to use them.
overview:
ArticleWriting Symbol Documentation in Your Source FilesAdd reference documentation to your symbols that explains how to use them.OverviewA common characteristic of a well-crafted API is that it’s easy to read and practically self-documenting. However, an API alone can’t convey important information like clear documentation does, such as:

The overall architecture of a framework or package

Relationships and dependencies between components in the API
title: Writing Symbol Documentation in Your Source Files
